settings.content:
Our Fresh Burgundy Truffles are sourced from Italy's prime truffle regions during autumn harvest season. These truffles offer an excellent introduction to gourmet truffles for those new to this ingredient.

Burgundy truffles have a milder flavour profile compared to winter truffle varieties. They feature earthy flavours with notes of hazelnut and subtle garlic. The interior has a marbled appearance and delivers hints of caramel and vanilla that complement dishes without overwhelming other ingredients.

Each truffle is hand-selected by experienced foragers when fully ripe. They arrive with their natural dark, textured skin that preserves the aromatic oils inside. We inspect every truffle to ensure you receive high-quality specimens with good aroma and flavour.

These truffles work well shaved over pasta, risotto, eggs, or incorporated into sauces and butter preparations.

Culinary Applications

For the ultimate truffle experience, gently scrape away the tough outer peridium (skin) with a paring knife to reveal the treasured interior—this removes any potential bitterness and allows the truffle's delicate caramel and vanilla essence to shine through.

Serving Suggestions
  • Shave paper-thin over creamy risottos or fresh pasta with butter and Parmigiano-Reggiano
  • Scrambled eggs or omelettes with generous truffle shavings
  • Transform simple dishes like polenta, mashed potatoes, or warm salads
  • Pair with mild baked cheeses (Camembert) to create an indulgent starter or supper.

Always shave truffles directly over warm, preferably buttery dishes to maximise aroma release. The heat activates the volatile compounds that create the truffle's signature fragrance.

Care & Storage

Refrigerate immediately in an airtight container. Wrap each truffle individually in an absorbent paper towel, replacing the paper daily to maintain dryness and prevent moisture buildup. This method preserves both texture and aroma integrity.

Best enjoyed within 5 days of arrival for peak flavour and aroma intensity.

settings.title: DELIVERY INFO
settings.content:
Order Cut-Off Times & Delivery Date Selection

Orders placed before 2 PM (Monday to Friday) are dispatched the same day, unless you select a future delivery date at checkout.

Our Delivery Service

We use reliable third-party express courier services and high-quality insulated packaging. While our couriers are generally excellent, occasional delays can happen. We pack everything to stay fresh, even if transit takes a little longer.

Time-Sensitive & Event Orders

Can we guarantee delivery on a specific day? Unfortunately not - we rely on third-party couriers and can't control their schedules. All items leave us in perfect condition with good use-by dates, but final timing depends on the courier.

If your order is for a specific event, let us know in the notes section at checkout. We can often dispatch a day earlier to give you the best chance of timely arrival.

DELIVERY Changes After Dispatch

Once dispatched, your package is with the courier and we're unable to redirect it or change delivery details.

Saturday Delivery

Saturday delivery is available, though please note our couriers don't operate phone support at weekends and our office is closed. For event-critical orders, a weekday delivery gives us more flexibility to help if any issues arise.

Full delivery details and shipping rates: here

settings.title: CHRISTMAS 2024 ORDER INFO
settings.content:
Please choose your delivery date for pre-christmas orders on the date-picker in your shopping basket with the following guidance. We will try our best to deliver on your selected day, but it is not guaranteed, so please allow for an extra day

ORDER DEADLINES 

ORDERS FOR DELIVERY ON OR BEFORE 23/12/24 - 11pm 19/12/23

ORDERS BETWEEN CHRISTMAS & NEW YEARS EVE - 11PM 27/12/24

Delivery slots are limited. Early booking is strongly recommended.

ORDERS CONTAINING FROZEN PRODUCTS ONLY

If you have space to store them, please request your order to be delivered as soon as possible, or choosing delivery before December 20th. We reserve the right to change your delivery date up to to 2 days prior if we feel it runs the risk of not arriving to you promptly.

FRESH TRUFFLES

Your truffles will be harvested as close to Christmas as possible to offer the longest shelf life and the freshest product. We fly them in from Europe early each morning on the same days we send them to you.

Last available Pre-Christmas delivery is 23rd December and the truffles will be good for a minimum of 6 days, any longer may impact your enjoyment - PLEASE notify us via email if you need them for the exact delivery day you requested or consider receiving them a day earlier, if that date is available.

As always with fresh truffles they are best eaten as soon as possible to enjoy maximum aroma.

FRESH PRODUCTS 

All fresh products are supplied with a use by date beyond 28/12/24, with the inclusion of fresh mushrooms and fresh truffles. We aim for delivery no later than the 23rd of December

WAGYU STEAK / FROZEN PRODUCTS ONLY/ DRY GOODS 

All of our frozen products have a long shelf life in the freezer or at least 5 days if defrosted. Orders containing only frozen products will be delivered no later than 20th of December. 

You can order certain products (subject to availability) for delivery on 30/12/24 

White truffles will not be available for delivery between Christmas & New Years Eve, Instead please order fresh black truffles.

FROM 18/12/24 Our phone lines are closed while we compile Christmas pre-orders, please email us and we will get back you as soon as possible. 

ORDER FOR WAREHOUSE COLLECTION

You can collect in person from our warehouse up until 5pm 23/12/24 - select PICK UP, on the checkout section of the website.

Customer service is available for delivery queries via info@fineandwild.com
For the best tips on the various truffle varieties and origin check out our blog
With their hazelnut, vanilla and caramel flavour profile they are delicious when shaved in abundance over green vegetables such as asparagus
